issue_summary: Rename expectedFalsePositiveProbability to expectedFpp. Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=32320997
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns the probability that {@linkplain #mightContain(Object)} will erroneously return * {@code true} for an object that has not actually been put in the {@code BloomFilter}. * *

Ideally, this number should be close to the {@code falsePositiveProbability} parameter * passed in {@linkplain #create(Funnel, int, double)}, or smaller. If it is * significantly higher, it is usually the case that too many elements (more than * expected) have been put in the {@code BloomFilter}, degenerating it. */
